body.title: Make `design` a first-class artifact type (decision folds in as a fork); rework /sorted + /design to emit it
body.intention: I intend that DESIGN is a first-class dev-process artifact type — the shape that realizes an intention, carrying its fork-decisions inside it — so the Design->Ticket boundary crosses a design artifact, not a decision.
body.description:
Keystone of the settled boundary contract (architecture/cc.0.workflow-levels.*, boundary contract COMPLETE 2026-07-10). The artifact-type stack is INTENTION -> DESIGN -> TICKET; DECISION is subtracted as a standalone type and becomes a FORK-RESOLUTION recorded INSIDE a design. Define the `design` artifact contract (fields: the intention(s) it realizes, the shape, the fork-decisions inside it each with why, the proof-obligations it must satisfy, links) and rework /sorted (decision-half) + /design (currently a bare marker) to EMIT a design artifact. NO device needed — the contract goes into the SKILLS.

**Affected files:** skills/sorted/, skills/design/, a new design artifact schema/store under devlab/runtime/memory/ (mirroring decisions/), architecture/cc.0.workflow-levels.* reconciled.
**Design rules:** intention=present-tense contract; every artifact carries its why; homogeneity over special-case; canonical-memory-home.
**Scope boundary:** IN — define the design artifact contract + make /sorted and /design emit it, with decisions recorded as forks inside. OUT — building Interviewer/Architect devices; OUT — the audit re-key (separate ticket, gated on this); OUT — the LLM-middle.
**Test plan:** proof = /sorted emits a design artifact with a fork-decision recorded inside it, validated against the contract (a red->green on the schema/emit path). Honest close: shipped-unproven only if no red form is reachable.
**Completion criteria:** design artifact contract defined; /sorted + /design emit it; decision recorded as a fork-within-design (not a standalone D-*); reconciled to architecture/workflow-levels.

Related: architecture/cc.0.workflow-levels.*, T-skills-review-prune-rearrange-intention-compat, project_intention_is_a_present_tense_contract.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Made design a first-class artifact type. design_store.py (contract+validate_design+read helpers), design_emit.py (validated writer + back-compat decision projection), designs/ category. /sorted emits a DESIGN with the decision folded in as forks[]; /design emits a DRAFT capturing the intention. Reader-gap resolved via projection (transitional, follow-on T-migrate-decision-readers-to-designs filed). Proof: forkless design rejected, red->green @0e35c311.
